title: Postpartum Care - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Postpartum Care 15 Matching Service Providers 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE BANDON FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1010 First Street SE Suite 110 Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 347-2529 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE PORT ORFORD FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1312 Tichenor Avenue Port Orford, OR 97465 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 332-1114 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ROSEBURG FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE WINSTON FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 671 SW Main Street Winston, OR 97496 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 492-4550 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DAISY CHAIN LACTATION AND FEEDING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers home visits conducted by an International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC) in the first 2 weeks after baby is born or adopted. IBCLCs create an individualized care plan to screen for and address barriers to successful chest/breastfeeding. 1270 Charnelton Street Daisy's Place 2nd Floor Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Expectant families, through birth or adoption Hours: By appointment Email (541) 505-1139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP POSTPARTUM DEPRESSION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides screenings and diagnostics for prenatal and postpartum depression and anxiety. 76 NE 12th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Clinic: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 8am-1pm (by appointment) Urgent care: Monday-Friday 2pm-6pm, Saturday 8am-1pm Email (541) 475-3874 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC PRENATAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal care offered through partnership with OHSU Hillsboro Medical Clinic. Patients who receive prenatal care at NHC will work with providers to make delivery arrangements at Hillsboro Medical Center. Prenatal care services include routine scheduled exams, lactation education and support, along with birth planning, postpartum, and well baby care. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH HOOD RIVER CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy. Prenatal care and postpartum services, including pregnancy education, breastfeeding and breast pump support/teaching. Mental health support and family planning services offered. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH THE DALLES CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy. Prenatal care and postpartum services, including pregnancy education, breastfeeding and breast pump support/teaching. Mental health support and family planning services offered. 1040 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 296-4610 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MIDWIFERY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers preconception counseling and individualized prenatal care; able to co-care for some health issues and can take late transfers with previous prenatal care established. Team of midwives and students serve families in a free-standing birth center and at home births, including water births. Postpartum care offered at birthing center or at patient's home and continues for both mother and baby for up to 6 weeks. Postpartum care includes newborn exam/screening, hearing screening, weight-checks, any lab work needed for mother, and can end with a well-woman exam. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SKY LAKES MEDICAL CENTER FAMILY BIRTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers childbirth classes, lactation consultations, and Baby Beginnings, a class for first-time parents. The program also provides prenatal, delivery, and postnatal care, as well as well-baby checkups and obstetric and gynecological services. 2865 Daggett Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 882-6311 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TOWER OF HEALTH LLC NATUROPATHIC MIDWIFERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides naturopathic midwifery care, including preconception, pregnancy, prenatal, postpartum, and parent and infant aftercare services. Doula services offered along with birth classes. 10175 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 300 BB Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Must be pregnant or post partum Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 464-6911 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Obstetric and Gynecological care. Services include contraceptives, menopause counseling and therapy, STD counseling and treatment, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, family planning, mother and infant care. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH YAMHILL NEWBERG CLINIC PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public health services provided by a nurse or nurse practitioner. Services include annual gynecological checkups (pap smears, breast and pelvic exams), testing and treatment of sexually transmitted infections (STIs) for men and women, pregnancy testing and options counseling for pregnant women, health education (including breast self-exam and testicular self-exam instruction), child/adult immunizations, and maternal and child health care. 2318 N Portland Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 434-7525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE DAISY CHAIN LACTATION AND FEEDING SUPPORT MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP POSTPARTUM DEPRESSION NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER PRENATAL CARE ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MIDWIFERY CARE SKY LAKES MEDICAL CENTER FAMILY BIRTH CENTER TOWER OF HEALTH LLC NATUROPATHIC MIDWIFERY WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH PUBLIC HEALTH SERVICES
